mapper.select: SELECT t.tx_id, t.tx_datetime, t.amount, t.merchant, t.memo, t.source, t.created_at, t.user_id, t.method_id, t.category_id, c.name as category_name, pm.name as method_name FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN projectdb.payment_methods pm ON t.method_id = pm.method_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.tx_datetime DESC

SELECT t.tx_id, t.tx_datetime, t.amount, t.merchant, t.memo, t.source, t.created_at, t.user_id, t.method_id, t.category_id, c.name as category_name, pm.name as method_name FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN projectdb.payment_methods pm ON t.method_id = pm.method_id WHERE t.tx_id = #{txId}

SELECT t.tx_id, t.tx_datetime, t.amount, t.merchant, t.memo, t.source, t.created_at, t.user_id, t.method_id, t.category_id, c.name as category_name, pm.name as method_name FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN projectdb.payment_methods pm ON t.method_id = pm.method_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND TO_CHAR(t.tx_datetime, 'YYYYMM') = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY t.tx_datetime DESC

SELECT t.tx_id, t.tx_datetime, t.amount, t.merchant, t.memo, t.source, t.created_at, t.user_id, t.method_id, t.category_id, c.name as category_name, pm.name as method_name FROM projectdb.transactions t LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN projectdb.payment_methods pm ON t.method_id = pm.method_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND (t.tx_datetime::date >= #{startDate} AND t.tx_datetime::date <= #{endDate}) ORDER BY t.tx_datetime ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.transactions ( tx_datetime, amount, merchant, memo, source, user_id, method_id, category_id ) VALUES ( #{txDatetime}, #{amount}, #{merchant}, #{memo}, #{source}, #{userId}, #{methodId}, #{categoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE projectdb.transactions SET tx_datetime = #{txDatetime}, amount = #{amount}, merchant = #{merchant}, memo = #{memo}, source = #{source}, method_id = #{methodId}, category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE tx_id = #{txId}
